  "decision": "fail",

  "order": [],
  "workable": [],
  "findings": [
    "Vacuum decay test failed",
    "Micron level rose from 397 to 1318 microns in 10 minutes",
    "Pressure exceeded the standard 500 micron limit and continues to rise, indicating a leak or significant moisture/outgassing"
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Perform a pressure test with dry nitrogen to locate and repair any leaks",
    "Re-evacuate the system and repeat the standing vacuum decay test"
  ],
  "rationale": "The system was isolated at 397 microns, but rose to 1318 microns after 10 minutes. A successful evacuation decay test must hold below 500 microns. Rising above 1000 microns indicates a leak in the system or a significant amount of moisture still present.",
  "references": [
    "EPA Section 608",
    "Industry Standard Evacuation Procedures (500 micron hold)"
  ]
}
